description_long: This is a hardcover book with a predominantly yellow and orange color scheme, featuring a glossy printed cover. The front cover displays a detailed architectural illustration of the Taj Mahal, set against a geometric background with subtle line art and polygonal shapes. The back cover continues the geometric motif, with a barcode in the lower right corner and a large white band near the top. The spine is vertically oriented, with bold Cyrillic text and a year marker, and is color-matched to the cover. The book appears to be of standard textbook thickness, with visible white pages sandwiched between the covers. The overall appearance suggests it is a modern educational book, likely used in academic or urban learning environments.
description: A hardcover book with a yellow-orange geometric cover and an illustration of the Taj Mahal, featuring bold Cyrillic text and a modern design.
description_view_0: The book is viewed from the top edge, showing the thickness of the white pages and the yellow-orange covers on either side.
description_view_1: The back cover is visible, featuring a geometric design, a large white band at the top, and a barcode in the lower right corner.
description_view_2: The spine is shown, with vertical Cyrillic text, the year '2018', and a color scheme matching the covers.
description_view_3: The front cover is visible, displaying an illustration of the Taj Mahal, geometric patterns, and bold Cyrillic title text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover is a detailed, realistic depiction of the Taj Mahal, set against a background of geometric line art and polygonal shapes. The style is modern and clean, with a focus on architectural detail and mathematical motifs.
attribute_spine_design: The spine features a vertical layout with a beige and white color scheme, bold Cyrillic text, the year '2018', and a small number '10' at the bottom. The design is clean and modern, matching the front and back covers.
attribute_publisher_logo: A blue and white oval-shaped logo is visible in the upper left corner of the front cover.
